home.title: Serene stays to discover Bacalar at an easier pace.
home.subtitle: Homes with character near the lagoon.

about.title: About
about.description: At Baluma Bacalar we bring together spaces designed to experience the lagoon at a calmer pace. You will find waterfront stays, homes surrounded by nature, and central options with a clearer booking experience from the very first look.
features: Privileged views and stays with their own identity.
A curated selection for quiet getaways or family trips.
Direct guidance to help you find the home that fits you best.

slide.title: A more thoughtful look at every stay
slide.description: Browse the spaces, materials, and corners that make each property distinct before you book.

contact.title: Book with more clarity and less friction
contact.description: Write to us to check availability, resolve questions, or find the ideal home for your trip.
contact.whatsAppMessage: Hi, I would like to know the availability of your homes in Bacalar.

footer.tagline: Calm stays, thoughtful design, and a great location.

lucias.name: Lucia's House
lucias.desc: Watch the sun and moon rise from the living room, beneath the private palapa, by the lagoon, or from a lounger on the dock while enjoying the nature around you. Lucia's House sits on the same property as three other homes and is ideal for couples. If you are traveling with a larger group, take a look at Nieve's, Bego's, and Maria's as well. The home enjoys an excellent location on Costera Sur, facing Bird Island.

includes.title: The stay
items: Views of the lagoon and garden. The house is elegant and gives guests plenty of room to rest and enjoy Bacalar's natural beauty.

includes.title: Other details to note
items: The docks, bikes, kayaks, and paddle boards are shared with 3 other homes.
The palapa in front of Lucia's House is private.
We respect our neighbors and quiet hours begin at 10 pm
We are next to a family restaurant, facing Bird Island

nieves.name: Nieve's House
nieves.desc: This place is surrounded by nature, from fruit trees to aromatic plants. Nieve's House sits on the same property as three other homes and is ideal for couples. If you are looking for more accommodations for a group, take a look at Lucia's, Bego's, and Maria's. The property enjoys an excellent location on Costera Sur, facing Bird Island.

includes.title: The stay
items: Terrace with table and private plunge pool
Home with kitchen and dining area
Bedroom with king bed and air conditioning
Our kitchens are equipped with modern appliances and everything you need to cook. The stove is induction and we also provide a refrigerator.

includes.title: Other details to note
items: The docks, bikes, kayaks, and paddle boards are shared with 3 other homes.
The palapa in front of Lucia's House is private.
We respect our neighbors and quiet hours begin at 10 pm
We are next to a family restaurant, facing Bird Island

marias.name: Maria's House
marias.desc: This apartment has a balcony overlooking the lagoon and garden. Relax in the jacuzzi on the terrace. The docks, garden, bikes, and kayaks are shared with 3 other stays: Lucia's, Bego's, and Nieve's. If you are traveling with friends or family, feel free to ask about booking all the spaces together. Our garden is full of local plants and birds, with swings and hammocks in the water.

includes.title: The stay
items: Upper floor: studio with a kitchen equipped with modern appliances (microwave, electric kettle, coffee maker, coffee, blender). Two queen beds, air conditioning, and fans
Ground floor: private bathroom with hot water

includes.title: Other details to note
items: The docks, bikes, kayaks, and paddle boards are shared with 3 other homes.
The palapa in front of Lucia's House is private.
We respect our neighbors and quiet hours begin at 10 pm
We are next to a family restaurant, facing Bird Island

casaAzul.name: Casa Azul
casaAzul.desc: Casa Azul is a two-story home with a Mayan-Balinese style. It enjoys an excellent location: half a block from the main square and one block from the lagoon. The upstairs bedroom has panoramic views, and the terrace includes a jacuzzi. A cool breeze usually arrives from the lagoon, so the house feels fresh even in warm weather thanks to the surrounding nature and natural materials.

includes.title: Other details to note
items: We can share our best local restaurant, gourmet, and tour recommendations in Bacalar and Mahahual
No private parking available (street parking only on the right side)

When you stay with us, you get exclusive access to CASA BAKAL hotel (located on Costera Sur), subject to availability from 11 am to 6 pm. Restaurant, therapy, and course purchases are additional. Kayaks, paddle boards, the pool, and towels are included.

includes.title: Main garden
items: Private cove access to the lagoon

begos.name: Bego's House
begos.desc: This apartment has a balcony facing the lagoon with garden views and a jacuzzi on its terrace. It is perfect for a couple or a family of 4 or 5. The docks, garden, bikes, and kayaks are shared with 3 other stays: Lucia's, Maria's, and Nieve's. If you are traveling with friends or family, ask about booking all the spaces together. Our garden is full of local plants and birds, with swings and hammocks in the water.

includes.title: The stay
items: Ground floor: kitchen, dining area, double bed, sofa bed, and bathroom with hot water, air conditioning, and fans
Upper floor: king bed, terrace with lagoon view, and jacuzzi. Air conditioning
The rooms are not separated by doors, only by a staircase
Kitchen equipped with modern appliances (gas stove, microwave, electric kettle, coffee maker, coffee, blender)

includes.title: Other details to note
items: The docks, bikes, kayaks, and paddle boards are shared with 3 other homes.
The palapa in front of Lucia's House is private.
We respect our neighbors and quiet hours begin at 10 pm
We are next to a family restaurant, facing Bird Island

changos.name: Chango's House
changos.desc: Disconnect from routine in our beautiful and cozy house and enjoy the surrounding nature in a large garden. The house, including the front and back gardens, is completely private and ideal for couples or small families. We are just steps from some of the best places and restaurants in town, and only three blocks from public lagoon access. If you need to work during your stay, the whole house has air conditioning and high-speed Wi-Fi.

includes.title: The stay
items: A spacious home with one bedroom, living room, dining room, and fully equipped kitchen
The bedroom has a queen bed, a full bathroom, and storage furniture for your clothes

The living room includes a resting area with two single beds, so we can host 2 to 4 guests. The garden is large and includes a palapa, outdoor dining area, barbecue area, and a second bathroom on the terrace.

tiliche.name: Estudio Tiliche
tiliche.desc: Disconnect from your routine while staying under the stars, surrounded by trees and birdsong. Enjoy your stay with lagoon views from our exclusive terrace.

includes.title: Other spaces
items: Parking spot on the curb, not covered

When you stay with us, you get exclusive access to CASA BAKAL hotel (located on Costera Sur), subject to availability from 11 am to 6 pm. Restaurant, therapy, and course purchases are additional. Kayaks, paddle boards, the pool, and towels are included.
